# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgraded SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net10.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. Included TFM bump, enabling nullable reference types and implicit usings, and migrating from the legacy CreateHostBuilder/Startup.cs pattern to the minimal hosting model.

**Progress**: 3/3 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-tfm-upgrade: Update TargetFramework to net10.0
- ✅ 02-hosting-model: Modernize Hosting Model
- ✅ 03-build-validate: Build and Validate
